prompt: Write sinter collect command and plot script for circuits in out/circuits/ with pymatching, 100 errors, 10M shots.

assertions.name: scripts_run_successfully
assertions.description: Circuit generation, collect, and plot scripts all execute without errors

assertions.name: stats_csv_created
assertions.description: Output CSV file exists with sampling data

assertions.name: plot_generated
assertions.description: A plot file (PNG/SVG) is generated from the stats

assertions.name: launch_script_provided
assertions.description: Provides a reusable launch/shell script rather than just inline commands
